formDescription: BC Fishing Licence Application form. Information about the angler, licence type, fishing region, optional classifications, conservation surcharge stamps, and estimated licence cost will be collected in this form.

angler_date_of_birth.title: Date of Birth
angler_date_of_birth.description: Angler's date of birth. Used to determine age eligibility and applicable licence rate.

bc_resident_status.title: BC Residency Status
bc_resident_status.description: If Residency status of the applicant is in British Columbia(BC)

non_bc_resident_canadian.title: Non BC Resident - but Canadian
non_bc_resident_canadian.description: If Residency status of the applicant is out of  British Columbia(BC), but else where in Canada

non_resident_alien.title: Non Canadian- Non BC Resident
non_resident_alien.description: Foreigner - If Residency status of the applicant is out of British Columbia(BC) and Canada

fish_and_wildlife_id.title: Fish and Wildlife ID (FWID)
fish_and_wildlife_id.description: Applicant's Fish and Wildlife ID. Leave blank if the applicant needs to register for a new FWID.

licence_duration.title: Duration
licence_duration.description: Duration of the fishing licence being requested.

senior_resident_rate.title: I am 65 or older(resident annual rate)
senior_resident_rate.description: Select this option if the applicant is 65 years of age or older and qualifies for the resident annual rate.

disability_fee_reduction_eligibility.title: I hold a Certificate of Eligibility for the fee reduction program (severe and permanent disability)
disability_fee_reduction_eligibility.description: Select this option if the applicant holds a Certificate of Eligibility for the fee reduction program due to severe and permanent disability.

fishing_region.title: Fishing Region
fishing_region.description: Fishing region where the applicant intends to fish.

conservation_steelhead_stamp.title: Steelhead
conservation_steelhead_stamp.description: Optional conservation surcharge stamp for Steelhead.

conservation_non_tidal_salmon_stamp.title: Non-Tidal Salmon
conservation_non_tidal_salmon_stamp.description: Optional conservation surcharge stamp for Non-Tidal Salmon.

conservation_kootenay_shuswap_rainbow_tr.title: Kootenay/Shuswap Rainbow Trout or Char
conservation_kootenay_shuswap_rainbow_tr.description: Optional conservation surcharge stamp for Kootenay/Shuswap Rainbow Trout or Char.

conservation_white_sturgeon_conservation.title: White Sturgeon Conservation Licence
conservation_white_sturgeon_conservation.description: Optional conservation surcharge licence for White Sturgeon.

estimated_licence_cost.title: Estimated Licence Cost
estimated_licence_cost.description: Estimated total licence cost based on selected licence type, region, and optional surcharges.
